Title: Authorizes the county of Nassau assessor to accept an application for a retroactive real property tax exemption from the Al-Hikmah Institute Inc.
Summary: Authorizes the county of Nassau assessor to accept an application for a retroactive real property tax exemption from the Al-Hikmah Institute Inc.
ActClause: AN ACT authorizing the county of Nassau assessor to accept an application for a retroactive real property tax exemption from the Al-Hikmah Institute Inc.
